steps.name: file-based-blog-loader
steps.summary: Added a file-based Markdown/MDX blog loader with published-only filtering, slug detail lookup, date sorting, and frontmatter validation tests.

steps.name: file-based-list-and-detail
steps.blocked_reason: Updated automated blog plan changes the main track to DB + generated Markdown/HTML with PostgreSQL + pgvector. Resume this step only if the file-based MVP direction is explicitly restored.
